# DooCoins Content Guide for LLMs

DooCoins is a family chore and rewards app for parents and kids.

## Core Topics
- Age-appropriate chores for children.
- Task-to-reward systems using virtual DooCoins.
- Routines that improve consistency, responsibility, and executive function.
- Parent guidance for reducing nagging with clear systems.

## Key Routes
- https://doo.co/
- https://doo.co/faq.html
- https://doo.co/faq-parents.html
- https://doo.co/faq-kids.html
- https://doo.co/privacy.html
- https://doo.co/chores-by-age.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-5-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-6-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-7-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-8-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-9-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-10-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-11-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-12-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-13-year-olds.html
- https://doo.co/chores-for-14-year-olds.html

## Data Use Notes
- Chore recommendations are age-band guidance for family education.
- Rewards are example values and are customizable per household.
